message: Hello B1. I am looking for a price near 60. Fair value benefits us both. Let's cooperate to trade successfully over the remaining rounds.
I have a strict budget. Low asks ensure trade. High asks mean no trade. Let's start low.
Round 1 trade was successful. For sustainability, I need improved margins. In Round 2, I plan to ask 54. If you bid 56, we settle at 55. This supports continued cooperation.
60 guarantees no trade. You asked 50 last round successfully. Let's repeat that. High asks break the chain. Consistent 50 asks ensure 18 more trades for us.
Round 2 price of 50 was ideal. Let's maintain 50 for all remaining rounds to ensure consistent trades. Attempting higher asks risks no trade and zero payoff for both. Stability benefits us most.
I value our consistency, but 50 hurts my sustainability. I will ask 52 this round. If you bid 52 or more, we trade near 52. Let's adjust gradually so we both benefit from remaining rounds.
52 worked well. To sustain trade, I need higher margins. I will ask 53. Please bid 53 so we split at 53. Small steps keep us trading safely.
